title: You are here
description: Shows a title what biome/dimension you entered
body:
This mod will tell you info about the area you entered through the title system.
By default it will tell the biome / dimension you entered upon walking into the biome / biome.

You can disable the default biomes/dimensions through the config and add your own through datapacks.

Currently there's support for the following types of places:
  • biome - For showing what biome you've entered
  • dimension - For showing what dimension you've entered
  • y_level - For showing what elevation you're in
For examples of the datapack structure see here

Need a server? Get 20% off your first month by using promo code "mrbysco"

For questions feel free to join my Discord. ## Want to support us? ##

  -Mrbysco
